div.style: position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 100vh; background: #000; overflow: hidden;

svg.style: position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1;

h1.style: position: relative; z-index: 2; font-size: 15vw; font-family: sans-serif;

button.style: position: fixed; top: 20px; z-index: 100; cursor: pointer; padding: 10px 20px;
